name: TN Quick Cash Hickory Hollow
description_short: Tennessee Quick Cash offers title loans, flex lines of credit, and check cashing services with same-day funding at their Antioch-Hickory Hollow location, open 24/7.
description_long:
Tennessee Quick Cash is a local financial services provider operating in Middle Tennessee with a physical location in Antioch at 5302 Mount View Road. The company specializes in fast cash solutions designed for consumers facing unexpected financial emergencies, positioning itself as an accessible alternative to traditional banking for those needing immediate funds.

The company offers three primary service categories: title loans (using vehicle titles as collateral for 30-day loans up to $6,500), flex loans (unsecured lines of credit with no annual or penalty fees), and check cashing services (including payroll, tax, government, and business checks at 2% for payroll). They emphasize speed of service, claiming instant funding and approval in as little as 5 minutes through online application. The Hickory Hollow location operates 24/7, providing extended accessibility compared to traditional lenders.

Tennessee Quick Cash distinguishes itself through its 24/7 availability, free vehicle value estimates for title loans, and transparent fee structure (2% payroll check cashing rate is explicitly stated). The flex loan product has no prepayment penalties and offers online account access. They also process multiple check types and offer money orders, positioning themselves as a one-stop emergency cash solution.

The company operates in a heavily regulated subprime lending space. Title loans require full repayment or renewal every 30 days and include Tennessee state-mandated 5% principal reductions starting on the third renewal. While the website emphasizes quick approval, actual APR and total cost of borrowing are not disclosed, which is typical but concerning for borrowers. The lack of transparent pricing information on interest rates for flex loans and title loans is a significant gap for consumers evaluating true cost.
pros: 24/7 operating hours at Hickory Hollow location provides accessibility outside standard business hours
Same-day funding available with application approval claimed in 5 minutes
Transparent check cashing fee structure (2% for payroll checks) clearly stated
Flex loans carry no annual fees, penalty fees, or prepayment penalties
Free vehicle value estimates provided before committing to title loans
Multiple loan products available (title loans, flex loans, check cashing) in one location
Online application and account management available for flex loans
cons: APR and total cost of borrowing not disclosed on website for any product type
Title loans require full repayment or renewal every 30 days, creating short repayment cycles
Tennessee state law mandates 5% principal reduction on title loans starting at third renewal, increasing costs
Maximum loan amount of $6,500 may be insufficient for larger emergency expenses
Collateral-based lending (title loans) risks vehicle repossession if unable to repay
best_for: Vehicle owners needing quick emergency cash with title as collateral
Consumers who need check cashing services with transparent, low fees (2% payroll rate)
Workers needing flexible lines of credit without annual or penalty fees
Individuals requiring access to financial services outside standard banking hours (24/7 availability)
diagnosis: TN Quick Cash Hickory Hollow is best for vehicle owners facing genuine emergencies who can repay within 30 days and those needing affordable check cashing. The primary caveat is that title loan terms create short repayment cycles with mandatory cost increases at renewal, and the complete absence of APR disclosure prevents full cost comparison with alternatives.
services: Title loans using vehicle titles as collateral (30-day terms, up to $6,500)
Flex loans (unsecured lines of credit with no annual or penalty fees)
Online loan applications with claimed 5-minute approval
